children.name: div
children.textContent: Choose a feeling to begin your adventure

children.name: div
children.textContent: What feeling needs a mission today?

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#7A6899" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-house" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M15 21v-8a1 1 0 0 0-1-1h-4a1 1 0 0 0-1 1v8"/><path d="M3 10a2 2 0 0 1 .709-1.528l7-6a2 2 0 0 1 2.582 0l7 6A2 2 0 0 1 21 10v9a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2z"/></svg>

children.name: div
children.textContent: Yesterday it took 8 minutes. Today just 3 minutes! That's huge! 💪

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#7A6899" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-house" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M15 21v-8a1 1 0 0 0-1-1h-4a1 1 0 0 0-1 1v8"/><path d="M3 10a2 2 0 0 1 .709-1.528l7-6a2 2 0 0 1 2.582 0l7 6A2 2 0 0 1 21 10v9a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2z"/></svg>

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#7A6899" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-heart" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M2 9.5a5.5 5.5 0 0 1 9.591-3.676.56.56 0 0 0 .818 0A5.49 5.49 0 0 1 22 9.5c0 2.29-1.5 4-3 5.5l-5.492 5.313a2 2 0 0 1-3 .019L5 15c-1.5-1.5-3-3.2-3-5.5"/></svg>

children.name: div
children.textContent: Trigger: Change in plans · 3 mins ago

children.name: text
children.textContent: Difficulty with transitions. Her nervous system is interpreting the change as a threat. She needs co-regulation before reasoning.

children.name: div
children.textContent: "I can see you're really upset about the change. That makes sense."

children.name: div
children.textContent: "Let's do a quick Calm Mission together before we talk about it."

children.name: div
children.textContent: "You're safe. We can figure this out when you're ready."

children.name: div
children.textContent: "Stop overreacting, it's not a big deal."

children.name: div
children.textContent: "You're too old to act like this."

children.name: div
children.textContent: "If you don't calm down right now…"

children.name: div
children.textContent: When kids face transitions, a "5-minute warning" before change helps the nervous system prepare. Try: "In 5 minutes, we'll switch from X to Y."

children.name: svg
